paper.title: GPT-5.1-Codex-Max System Card
paper.abstract: This system card outlines the comprehensive safety measures implemented for GPT‑5.1-CodexMax. It details both model-level mitigations, such as specialized safety training for harmful tasks and prompt injections, and product-level mitigations like agent sandboxing and configurable network access.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
